iPad iMagineering from Penguin Books on Vimeo.

swiss replcia watches

This is our constructed city, without question the geography of our souls, but these people are not us, they inhabit our city as if they belonged here, the presumption of their right to it is in every gesture, every glance, but they are not us, they're strangers inhabiting our city, though vaguely familiar, like strangers in our dreams.

E.L.Doctorow 'City of God'

Street Art, Milan, 2013


Prussia Cove, Cornwall (Watercolour, 2013)



Self Portrait, Cornwall, 2013




We only think we are creating things that don't already exist in nature.

Room with a View, 22/06/09

Study for 'Babe in the Woods' - 02.07.09

Market Trader, (Acrylic on Canvas), September 2009


'Self portrait' - acrylic on watercolour paper, July 2009

'The mass media first convinced us that the imaginary was real, and now they are convincing us that the real is imaginary; and the more reality the TV screen shows us, the more cinematic our everyday world becomes. Until, as certain philosophers have insisted, we will think that we are alone in the world, and that everything else is the film that God or some evil spirit is projecting before our eyes.'

'How to React to Familiar Faces', Umberto Eco, 1989

And a Happy New Year Everyone!




'Babe in the Woods' (acrylic on lining paper) July 2009

Pre-emptive infosuicide is the reason I haven't got a blog.

1: Vignette

Door after door; shabby walls, even
the lightfittings with their tidemarks
of grubby fingertips - you could see
the lives that were lived there -
intensely; the small sad round of them.
aerodynamics the three dimensional sculpture of non-euclidian space-time


Genocide The economics of mass production applied to self disgust

robotics the systematic degradation of the machine

aerodynamics the three dimensional sculpture of non-euclidian space-time

definitions, by J G Ballard

'Ella', Acrylic on Watercolour Paper, 14.08.09

Always design a thing by considering it in its next larger context a chair in a room, a room in a house, a house in an environment, an environment in a city plan.

Eero Saarinen

Stages of Love

infatuation
inspiration
familiarisation
reflection
disillusionment
bitterness
amnesia

--- please note this is a circular process ----

writing

If you're looking for news about my novel, CAPOSCRIPTI, go to www.caposcripti.com.

news

2025-01-07

Night Shift is out with Ampersand Press

Ampersand Press have released my new book Night Shift

Charlie and Eva love each other, but nothing is ever that simple.

Whilst Charlie is distracted running a busy mortuary, Eva leads a double life, troubled by strange events and haunted by magpies. Faced with the inevitability of death, she dreams of a different ending.

As Eva's hidden world increasingly collides with reality, Charlie must make a choice.

Is love enough to fill the hole inside us?

» Ampersand Press

» view all stories

about this site

Badzelda.com has been online since 1996, as a repository for writing, experiments, photography, work and thoughts.
